name: python3-base58
title: python3-base58
summary: Python library with Base58 encode and decode functions
description:
Python library with Base58 encode and decode functions
This package contains the following functions, in a form compatible with that
used by the bitcoin network:
- b58encode
- b58decode
- b58encode_check
- b58decode_check
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
